config.footprintparticle.can_gen_when_in: Allow footprint generation for invisible entities
config.footprintparticle.enable_boat_tra: Allow boats to generate wake trails in water
config.footprintparticle.enable_mod.tool: Controls which entities can generate footprints
config.footprintparticle.footprint_alpha: Opacity of footprint particles (0.1 = very transparent, 1.0 = opaque)
How long footprints remain visible (in seconds)
config.footprintparticle.rail_flame_rang: Chance for minecarts to generate sparks on rails (0.0 = never, 1.0 = always)
config.footprintparticle.snow_dust_level: Controls which entities kick up snow dust when walking on snow
Controls which entities generate particles when swimming
config.footprintparticle.title: Footprint Particle Configuration
config.footprintparticle.water_splash_le: Controls which entities generate water splash effects
config.footprintparticle.watermark_alpha: Opacity of watermark particles when wet
config.footprintparticle.wet_duration.to: How long entities remain 'wet' after leaving water (in seconds)
text.footprintparticle.option.applyBlock:
Blocks that footprint will appear.
Format: §9§omodid:blockid§r or §9§o#modid:blocktag§r
Use only when built-in hardness-based filter
cannot suit your requirements.
text.footprintparticle.option.blockHeigh:
Adjust print offset when gen on those blocks.
Format: §9§omodid:blockid,height§r or §9§o#modid:blocktag,height§r
Take effect when you stand IN that blocks.
text.footprintparticle.option.canGenWhen: Allow gen for entity has Invisible?
text.footprintparticle.option.customPrin:
Set a specific texture for a specific mob.
Format: §9§omodid:mobid,fileName1,fileName2,...§r
§5file§r must be a PNG and located at
§oassets/footprintparticle/textures/particle§r
in your resourcepack.
Meanwhile, you need to register it at
§oassets/footprintparticle/particles/footprint.json§r or
§oassets/footprintparticle/particles/watermark.json§r
if you want to replace watermark at same time.
More see in wiki.
text.footprintparticle.option.excludedBl:
Blocks that footprint will NOT appear.
Format: §9§omodid:blockid§r or §9§o#modid:blocktag§r
Lower priority than applied.
text.footprintparticle.option.excludedMo:
Mobs in this list will not generate footprint.
Format: §9§omodid:mobid§r
text.footprintparticle.option.footprintS:
Measure in pixel. 
Change it to actual texture width for better visual if you using custom texture.
text.footprintparticle.option.horseLikeM:
Mobs in this list will have a specific front-back offset to gen.
They'll also changed frequency when is mounted or dismounted.
Format: §9§omodid:mobid,value§r
0.75 will be used if value is empty.
text.footprintparticle.option.mobInterva:
Mob in this list which SecondPerPrint
will multiply by specific value.
Format: §9§omodid:mobid,value§r
text.footprintparticle.option.printHeigh:
Use to prevent print gen under terrain
when enable normal map in shader mod.
text.footprintparticle.option.sizePerMob:
Set a separate print size multiple for a mob.
Format: §9§omodid:mobid,size§r
Lower priority than excluded.
text.footprintparticle.option.snowDust: Kick up snow (when print gen on it)
text.footprintparticle.option.spiderLike:
Mobs in this list will have a specific left-right offset to gen.
Format: §9§omodid:mobid,value§r
0.9 will be used if value is empty.
text.footprintparticle.option.title: Footprint Particle
text.footprintparticle.option.waterSplas: Kick up splash (when walking on rain)
text.footprintparticle.option.wetDuratio:
Control how long the time of Watermark gen
after you away from water/rain.
Set 0 to disable watermark.
The §lWatermark§l is gen when footprint cannot gen.
It's ignored block list.
